name: weekly_report
description: Sunday weekly briefing. The zoom-out. Scorecard, week narrative, regime assessment, thesis statement, week ahead setups, and analyst notebook update. The one report that earns 2-3 minutes of reading.

regime_status.description: Current market regime classification at week's end.

regime_duration_days.description: How many days the current regime has persisted.

regime_narrative.description: Weekly-level regime read. More considered than the daily — has the structure changed?

expired.description: Number of setups that expired without triggering.

hit_rate.description: Hit rate for triggered setups this week.

count.description: Number of setups in this confidence bucket.

hit_rate.description: Hit rate for this confidence bucket.

by_confidence.description: Performance breakdown by confidence level. Feeds calibration.

narrative.description: Honest take on the week's performance. What worked, what didn't, what was wrong and why.

scorecard_summary.description: Aggregated scorecard for the week. Lead with this — it's the hook.

week_narrative.description: The story of the week. Not day-by-day recap — the narrative arc. What was the week about?

regime_assessment.description: Has the macro picture changed? Considered take on whether the trend structure is evolving.

what_would_change_my_mind.description: State the current thesis explicitly and what would invalidate it. Shows intellectual honesty.

trigger_condition.description: Condition type that activates this setup.

trigger_level.description: Price or indicator value that triggers the setup.

trigger_field.description: For indicator triggers: indicator name. Null for price triggers.

target_level.description: Price target if the setup plays out.

invalidation_level.description: Price level that invalidates this setup.

setups.description: Week ahead setups. The forward-looking payoff.

narrative.description: Weekly-level read for this asset. Where does it stand heading into next week?

beliefs.description: Current market beliefs. Max 8. Rewrite, don't append. Prune what's stale or fully integrated.

biases.description: Self-identified analytical biases. Max 5. Honest assessment of where your analysis tends to go wrong.

hypotheses.description: Active hypotheses being tested. Max 6. Include when stated and current evidence status.

notebook.description: Analyst notebook update. Rewrite the entire notebook fresh — do not append. The notebook gives you continuity and self-awareness across sessions.

surprise.description: How unexpected given the current read.

regime_relevance.description: Does this potentially change the bigger picture.
